title: Precision Quick Fill Targeting
notes: Corrected iPad touch-to-canvas coordinate handling used when tapping holes.
Quick Fill now prefers coordinates measured directly from the canvas instead of coordinates that can shift when the browser visual viewport changes.
The correction applies to both Drill Log and Shot Diagram and is most noticeable when the page is zoomed out.
Mouse and trackpad targeting remain unchanged.
Multi Quick Fill, manual GPS tags and callouts, canvas backgrounds, exports, and backups remain included.
